title: Translation Units, Declarations, Diagnostics, and Linking · C Contract Brief: Preprocessing Boundaries
summary: A portable telemetry library compiles in one file but fails or silently changes behavior after its API is split across files. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem preprocessing boundaries increment in warning-clean multi-file interface dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict macro expansion, conditional compilation, include guards, and header ownership before translation.
State what tests, warnings, analyzers, sanitizers, proofs, reviews, and production telemetry can and cannot establish.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Preprocessing Boundaries · Theory Preprocessing Boundaries
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 9278. Produce bounded C evidence to model translation and diagnostic gates before execution; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.
